text:
was a graduate of the 104th Training Corps who fought during the battle for Trost District and was assigned to the middle guard after the Colossus Titan's second attack.

Appearance

Thomas had blond hair with pronounced sideburns, and was usually seen wearing the standard trainee uniform or simple casual attire when off-duty.

Personality

Thomas was initially quite pessimistic about defeating the Titans, believing that humanity ultimately stands no chance, but he would later change his way of thinking after hearing an inspiring speech from Eren. As a trainee, Thomas admitted to still being a bit cowardly, as he was too frightened to immediately act upon witnessing the Colossus Titan for the first time. Despite this, Thomas was also somewhat of a leader, rallying his team into turning their first battle into a hunting competition despite the inherent uncertainty.

Story

104th Training Corps arc

On the first night of his time in the 104th Training Corps, Thomas and his fellow trainees swamp Eren Yeager with questions about the Fall of Wall Maria after learning that he is a survivor from Shiganshina District.

When Eren retakes his Vertical maneuvering equipment aptitude test, Thomas is put in charge of operating the training equipment for the test. Eren fails again, and Instructor Shadis orders Thomas to lower him down and exchange harnesses with him, revealing that there is a defect in Eren's.

Wall Sealing arc

The day after their graduation, Thomas's squad is assigned to clean out the cannons atop Wall Rose. As they are working, Thomas reveals to Eren that his words the previous night inspired many of the trainees to consider joining the Survey Corps. Their conversation is interrupted by Sasha Blouse, who reveals that she has stolen meat from the officers' lounge. Despite some reservations, Thomas agrees to partake, celebrating the idea of retaking Wall Maria soon.

Their festivities are cut short when the Colossus Titan appears outside Trost District, knocking them off the Wall with a blast of steam. Eren orders them to attack the Colossus Titan, but Thomas and his comrades are too shocked to immediately react. The Titan escapes, but Thomas commends Eren for trying to attack it.

Thomas is assigned to the middle guard along with Eren, Armin Arlert, Mylius Zeramuski, Nac Tias, and Mina Carolina. He suggests they have a contest on who can kill the most Titans. Noticing the alarming amount of Titans in the middle guard, the squad begins to advance, but an abnormal Titan surprises them, catching Thomas it its mouth and swallowing him whole, while his team mates watch in horror.

Armin would later report his demise to the remaining members of the 104th Training Corps, saying he died valiantly in the line of duty.

Legacy

Royal Government arc

While speaking to Historia under the Reiss Chapel, Eren mentions Thomas as being among the victims he and Grisha Yeager were responsible for killing by stealing the Founding Titan.

Return to Shiganshina arc

During the Survey Corps feast before the battle of Shiganshina District, Eren remembers of Thomas at the time Sasha stole meat.
